signals.raw: **XRP CLARITY Act & SEC/CFTC developments**: SEC and CFTC classified XRP as a 'digital commodity' in late March 2026, shifting oversight to CFTC; this occurred weeks ago, not today[2][3]. Senate returns April 13 for potential CLARITY Act markup on stablecoin yield, with rumors of compromise, but no confirmation or vote today (still pending as of mid-April analyses)[2]. signals.raw: **Recent price action**: XRP hit $1.51 intraday high on April 17 (first in 2026), closed at $1.48, pulled back to ~$1.43 by April 19; spot ETF inflows of $224M early April drove it, but no fresh triggers today[5]. Current trading ~$1.30-$1.34 amid analyst splits ($1.15-$1.60 for April), whale accumulation, reduced exchange supply[3][4].
